# env (Ephemeral Resource)

Ephemeral resource to access environment variables.

## Example Usage

```terraform
ephemeral "env" "example" {
  variables = ["FOO", "BAR"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `variables` (List of String) The list of environment variable names to retrieve.

### Read-Only

- `values` (Map of String) The map of the environment variable values retrieved.
